# Pull Request

## Description

Please provide a clear description of the changes introduced by this PR.

Example:

- Fix video frame extraction bug
- Add batch folder processing
- Improve FFmpeg error handling

---

## Type of Change

Please check the relevant option.

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test addition

---

## Related Issue

If this PR resolves an issue, link it here.

Example:

Fixes #12

---

## Changes Made

List the main changes introduced in this PR.

- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

---

## Testing

Explain how the changes were tested.

Example:

- Tested on Linux
- Verified with MP4 and MKV videos
- Batch processing tested with 10 videos

---

## Screenshots (Optional)

If UI changes are involved, include screenshots.

---

## Checklist

Before submitting your PR, ensure:

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Code runs without errors
- [ ] Documentation updated if necessary
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] Commit messages are clear
